name: proxmox-manager
description: Proxmox VM/CT Management Tool – A robust Bash TUI for managing Proxmox virtual machines and containers. Features include listing, status, start/stop/restart, snapshot management, console access, SPICE integration, and permission checks.
readme_summary: Proxmox Manager is a single Bash script that provides an interactive text-based user interface (TUI) for managing Proxmox Virtual Machines (VMs) and Containers (CTs). It simplifies common tasks like starting, stopping, listing, and managing snapshots, offering both interactive and machine-readable output options.
key_features: Single-file Bash script for Proxmox VE management
Interactive TUI for VMs and CTs
Start, stop, restart instances with confirmation
Console access (LXC shell or QEMU terminal)
Displays node hostname, PVE version, and uptime
primary_use_case: To provide a user-friendly, scriptable interface for managing Proxmox VE virtual machines and containers directly from the command line.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot arm acting as a conductor, orchestrating a symphony of virtual machines and containers represented by glowing orbs and digital blocks. The robot arm is smoothly moving between these elements, initiating actions like starting (a green light pulsing), stopping (a red light dimming), and creating snapshots (a camera icon appearing). Subtle UI elements resembling a clean Bash TUI are projected around the robot's base, showing instance names and statuses. The background is a clean, modern data center aesthetic with soft, ambient lighting. The overall style should be a 3D isometric illustration with vibrant, contrasting colors to highlight the active management. The repository name 'Proxmox Manager' is subtly integrated into a digital display on the robot's chassis.

name: gridland
description: Terminal apps that run anywhere - even the browser!
readme_summary: Gridland is a TypeScript framework for building terminal applications that can also run seamlessly in web browsers. It leverages the OpenTUI rendering engine and provides React components for creating interactive command-line interfaces.
key_features: Build terminal apps that run in the browser
primary_use_case: Developing cross-platform terminal user interfaces (TUIs) that can be deployed as both standalone command-line applications and web applications.
cover_image_prompt: A split scene: on the left, a vibrant, bustling terminal window filled with interactive elements and colorful text, representing a command-line application. On the right, the exact same interface is seamlessly rendered within a modern web browser window, demonstrating its dual nature. A subtle, glowing pathway connects the two, symbolizing the Gridland framework. Small, abstract code snippets float around the connection point. The overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and illustrative, with a focus on the seamless transition between environments. 3D isometric illustration style.

name: NomAI-App
readme_summary: NomAI is an open-source Flutter application designed for tracking meals and analyzing nutrition. It leverages AI to provide personalized guidance, making healthy eating more accessible and sustainable through features like quick logging, detailed analytics, and a conversational assistant.
key_features: Meal logging with detailed nutrition breakdowns
AI chat assistant for analysis, planning, and tips
Monthly analytics with charts and summary statistics
Personalization based on dietary preferences, allergies, and targets
Image recognition for faster meal logging
primary_use_case: Personalized AI-powered nutrition tracking and meal analysis for healthier eating habits.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot chef stands in a bright, modern kitchen, holding a tablet displaying colorful nutritional data. In front of the robot, a plate of food is being analyzed by a gentle beam of light, with glowing icons representing calories, protein, and carbs appearing above it. To the side, a chat bubble icon floats, hinting at the AI assistant. The overall scene is clean and inviting, with subtle digital particles flowing around the robot and tablet, representing data and AI. The NomAI logo is subtly integrated into the kitchen decor. The style should be a vibrant 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a welcoming color palette.

name: GitHub-Store
description: 🩵 A free, open-source app store for GitHub releases — browse, discover, and install apps with one click. Powered by Kotlin and Compose Multiplatform for Android & Desktop (Linux, MacOS, Windows).
readme_summary: GitHub Store is a cross-platform application store that allows users to discover and install open-source software directly from GitHub releases. It supports automatic detection of various executable formats and provides a streamlined one-click installation process with update tracking.
key_features: Browse and discover open-source apps from GitHub releases
Automatic detection of installable binaries (APK, EXE, DMG, AppImage, DEB, RPM)
Built with Kotlin Multiplatform and Compose Multiplatform
Supports Android and Desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows)
primary_use_case: To provide a centralized and user-friendly platform for discovering, installing, and managing open-source applications distributed via GitHub releases across multiple operating systems.
cover_image_prompt: A friendly, stylized robot librarian standing in a grand, modern library filled with shelves. Instead of books, the shelves hold glowing icons representing various software applications. The robot is holding a tablet displaying a clean app store interface and is actively placing a new software icon onto an empty shelf, signifying installation. Small, subtle digital particles representing code and data flow around the robot and the icons. In the background, a large, stylized GitHub logo is visible, hinting at the source of the software. The overall mood is welcoming and efficient, with a clean, bright aesthetic. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with soft lighting and vibrant, distinct colors for each software icon.

name: BloomeeTunes
description: 🌸Bloomee is a cross-platform music app designed to bring you ad-free tunes from various sources. 🌼🎵
readme_summary: BloomeeTunes is a cross-platform, ad-free music player built with Flutter and Rust. It allows users to seamlessly stream music from various online sources via a plugin system while also playing local music files. The app offers features like lyrics, an equalizer, and Last.fm scrobbling.
primary_use_case: To provide a unified, ad-free music listening experience by combining local music playback with streaming from various online sources through a plugin system.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, magical treehouse where the branches are made of glowing audio waves and musical notes. From one side of the treehouse, local music files (represented as small, colorful music boxes) are being fed into a central, intricate mechanism. From the other side, a stream of diverse musical notes and symbols representing online music sources flows in, powered by a secure, crystalline Rust-backed plugin system. The treehouse itself is the BloomeeTunes app, with a friendly, stylized interface visible on a window. The output is a beautiful, harmonious melody emanating from the treehouse, enjoyed by diverse listeners depicted in the background. The scene is bathed in warm, inviting light, rendered in a whimsical 3D isometric illustration style with rich details and a bright, cheerful color palette.
